page_metadata.biotools__summary: Multidimensional image processing tool developed to handle data from magnetic resonance imaging. Some features include: Projection reconstruction algorithms for MRI data, Multidimensional Fourier transforms ,Convolution operators for image smoothing and enhancement or  Simple volume rendering functionality.

Some features include: Projection reconstruction algorithms for MRI data, Multidimensional Fourier transforms ,Convolution operators for image smoothing and enhancement or  Simple volume rendering functionality.
